narrative:
Poland Twp township has 9,606 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.8 percentage points.
